suite.name: Login Regression

kw.name: Open Browser To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.
Opens browser and navigates to the login page

test.name: TC004 - Successful Login Then Logout Returns To Login Page

kw.name: Login With Credentials
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Enters credentials and submits the login form

kw.name: Verify Login Success
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'css=div#flash.success' contains text 'You logged into a secure area!'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.
Confirms successful login by checking flash message and URL

kw.name: Logout From Application
Click Link
kw.doc: Clicks a link identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Clicks logout and verifies redirection

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

test.doc: Full round-trip: login → verify secure area → logout → verify login page

test.name: TC005 - Valid Password Wrong Username Shows Error

kw.name: Login With Credentials
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Enters credentials and submits the login form

kw.name: Verify Login Error
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'css=div#flash.error' contains text 'Your username is invalid!'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.
Confirms login failure flash message is displayed

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

test.doc: Correct password but wrong username must still fail

test.name: TC006 - Valid Username Wrong Password Shows Error

kw.name: Login With Credentials
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Enters credentials and submits the login form

kw.name: Verify Login Error
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.
Confirms login failure flash message is displayed

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

test.doc: Correct username but wrong password must still fail

kw.name: Close Test Session
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes all browsers after suite

suite.doc: Regression tests for login - extended coverage Target: https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
